category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/googleapis/genai-toolbox says MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.
source_facts.description says this is an MCP server for databases.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses MCP Toolbox for Databases for the project name.
Official documentation title at https://googleapis.github.io/genai-toolbox is MCP Toolbox for Databases.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the full documentation.
Official documentation site at googleapis.github.io/genai-toolbox states it contains all Toolbox documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/googleapis/genai-toolbox; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes database access for agents, connection pooling, authentication, observability, and supported database sources.
source_facts.description identifies an MCP server for databases.
